message.content:
Read these files in d:\intelligent-coding-assistant\backend and report their full content:
1. src/main/java/com/coding/assistant/config/WebConfig.java (or any SecurityConfig.java / WebSecurityConfig.java)
2. Look in src/main/java/com/coding/assistant/security/ for any security configuration files and read them all

I need to know which API paths are permitted without auth and which require authentication.
